The walnut e-ink desk object
Coming Soon · Hardware Edition

Your life,
rendered in ink.

Light Up is a handcrafted walnut-and-e-ink desk object that shows the full arc of your life — month by month — and the dreams you intend to live. No notifications. No feeds. Just clarity.

Prototype · Walnut + E-Ink Display
